name: vocab-voyage
description: Vocabulary tools for ISEE, SSAT, SAT, PSAT, GRE, GMAT, and LSAT prep — Word of the Day, definitions, quizzes, course word lists, and study plan previews.

bearer.description: Optional. Pass a personal MCP token (vv_mcp_…) generated at https://vocab.voyage/mcp to unlock personalized tools.
bearer.rotation: Generate a new token at https://vocab.voyage/mcp, deploy, then revoke the previous one.
bearer.revocation: Open https://vocab.voyage/mcp and click Revoke. Immediate.

scopes.name: mcp.read
scopes.description: Read MCP metadata and public tool results. Required for any MCP usage.

scopes.name: mcp.tools
scopes.description: Invoke public MCP tools (definition, quiz, courses, study plan). Required to call tools.

scopes.name: profile.read
scopes.description: Read connected user's display name, account type, and preferred course.

scopes.name: progress.read
scopes.description: Read mastery, streaks, and recent sessions for the connected user.

error_codes.meaning: Personalized tool called without a vv_mcp_ token.
Token missing required scope. Response includes required_scopes array.
Token has been revoked or expired. Generate a new one at /mcp.

tools.name: get_word_of_the_day
tools.description: Returns today's vocabulary Word of the Day, optionally scoped to a test family.

tools.name: get_definition
tools.description: Look up the definition, part of speech, example sentence, and synonyms/antonyms for a word.

_meta.ui.widgetDescription: Definition card with examples and synonyms.

tools.name: generate_quiz
tools.description: Generate a multiple-choice vocabulary quiz for a test family (1–10 questions).

tools.name: get_course_word_list
tools.description: Get a sample of vocabulary words from a specific Vocab Voyage course.

tools.name: list_courses
tools.description: Lists all 13 Vocab Voyage courses with their slugs and descriptions.

tools.name: explain_word_in_context
tools.description: Explain what a word means inside a specific sentence.

tools.name: study_plan_preview
tools.description: Returns a sample 7-day study plan (5 words/day) for a given test family.
